languages.text: Техножрец, избравший медицину и биологию в качестве области своих научных изысканий. Генеторы являются весьма многочисленной группой среди Адептус Механикус, во многом определяющей политику культа. Среди прочих братьев по вере, их отличительной особенностью является повышенный исследовательский интерес к различным формам органической жизни.

A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research. Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.
languages.original_text: Техножрец, избравший медицину и биологию в качестве области своих научных изысканий. Генеторы являются весьма многочисленной группой среди Адептус Механикус, во многом определяющей политику культа. Среди прочих братьев по вере, их отличительной особенностью является повышенный исследовательский интерес к различным формам органической жизни.

Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.

Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.

A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research. Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.

languages.text: Un tecnosacerdote que ha elegido los campos de medicae y biología para sus estudios científicos. Los genetores son una gran parte de los miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus y tiene mucha influencia en las políticas del culto. Se distinguen del resto de sus correligionarios por su notable interés por toda clase de forma de vida orgánica.
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research. Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.

traits.locale_text: Un tecnosacerdote que ha elegido los campos de medicae y biología para sus estudios científicos. Los genetores son una gran parte de los miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus y tiene mucha influencia en las políticas del culto. Se distinguen del resto de sus correligionarios por su notable interés por toda clase de forma de vida orgánica.

languages.text: 将医学与生物学作为科研方向的技术神甫。基因士在机械修会中占据极大比例，并对教派政策有着举足轻重的影响力。基因士与其他修会同僚最大的区别，在于他们对各种有机生命形式抱有近乎狂热的研究兴趣。
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research. Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.

traits.locale_text: 将医学与生物学作为科研方向的技术神甫。基因士在机械修会中占据极大比例，并对教派政策有着举足轻重的影响力。基因士与其他修会同僚最大的区别，在于他们对各种有机生命形式抱有近乎狂热的研究兴趣。

languages.text: Un technoprêtre ayant choisi la biologie et la medicae comme champs de recherche scientifique. Les genetors représentent une partie non négligeable des membres de l'Adeptus Mechanicus et ont donc une grande influence sur les décisions du culte. Ils se distinguent des autres fidèles par leur intérêt spécifique pour les diverses formes de vie organiques.
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research. Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.

traits.locale_text: Un technoprêtre ayant choisi la biologie et la medicae comme champs de recherche scientifique. Les genetors représentent une partie non négligeable des membres de l'Adeptus Mechanicus et ont donc une grande influence sur les décisions du culte. Ils se distinguent des autres fidèles par leur intérêt spécifique pour les diverses formes de vie organiques.

languages.text: Bilimsel araştırma sahası olarak sıhhiye ve biyoloji dallarını seçmiş bir Tekno Rahip. Genetörler, Adeptus Mechanicus üyelerinin büyük kısmını meydana getirirler ve tarikatın politikalarının belirlenmesinde büyük nüfuz sahibidirler. Farklı organik yaşam formlarına duydukları yoğun araştırma merakıyla, diğer iman kardeşlerinden ayrılırlar.
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research. Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.

traits.locale_text: Bilimsel araştırma sahası olarak sıhhiye ve biyoloji dallarını seçmiş bir Tekno Rahip. Genetörler, Adeptus Mechanicus üyelerinin büyük kısmını meydana getirirler ve tarikatın politikalarının belirlenmesinde büyük nüfuz sahibidirler. Farklı organik yaşam formlarına duydukları yoğun araştırma merakıyla, diğer iman kardeşlerinden ayrılırlar.

languages.text: テクプリストが医学や生物学を研究分野として選んだもの。遺伝子工学者は機械神官団の構成員の大部分を占め、その教義を決定する上で大きな影響力を持つ。他の信者とは、様々な有機生命体の研究に強い関心を示す点で区別される。
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research. Genetors account for a large portion of the members of the Adeptus Mechanicus, and they hold great sway in determining the policies of the cult. They are distinguished from other brethren of the faith by their keen research interest in various forms of organic life.

traits.locale_text: テクプリストが医学や生物学を研究分野として選んだもの。遺伝子工学者は機械神官団の構成員の大部分を占め、その教義を決定する上で大きな影響力を持つ。他の信者とは、様々な有機生命体の研究に強い関心を示す点で区別される。

languages.text: Ein Techpriester, der Medicae und Biologie als wissenschaftliche Forschungsfelder gewählt hat. Genetoren stellen einen großen Teil der Mitglieder des Adeptus Mechanicus und haben großen Einfluss auf die Politik des Kultes. Sie unterscheiden sich von anderen Glaubensbrüdern durch ihr kühnes Interesse für die Erforschung organischer Lebensformen.
languages.original_text: A Tech-Priest who has chosen medicae and biology as their field of scientific research.
